calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Denise Kendall for Desiree Bree Mickle, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Discussion was held as to whether San Francisco County is the appropriate venue for this action. Ms. Kendall stated that trustee Dennis Mickle, who resides in Lincoln, California, has failed to communicate with her or the beneficiary despite prior contact.

The court denied the petition without prejudice on the grounds of improper venue, advising that the matter be refiled in Placer County, where the trustee resides.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Dec-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
